Name: Best Song Intro
Description: Some songs just make you feel some type of way when those first few notes hit. Submit the coolest, strangest, or overall best intro you know of

Name: Chester Chez City
Description: We’re taking a trip to D-town Chez this week. Submit songs that the young Chester would absolutely adore. We’re talking, songs that Chez would play around the house so much that Wank gets rage-baited from across the other room. Songs that bring the dirt out of Dirty Sanchez

Name: Turd is the Word
Description: Songs with titles that can describe a poop

Name: Dynamic Duos
Description: Mahomes and Kelce. Peanut Butter and Jelly. Bert and Ernie. Sometimes a pairing is just on the same wavelength. These are the best songs by a 2errific 2some

Name: Best Song Made for a Movie
Description: You’re telling me that eminem went out there to perform with vomit on his sweater ? And it worked ? That’s crazy ! Of course we needed an original song for that, no other song could capture that emotion that was needed for the movie

Name: 3AM Emergency
Description: It's 3am. There's been an emergency, and you need to get to the hospital. You get in your car and put on this song:

Name: Raw Dog City
Description: This week is NOT gen-z brainrot certified. Submit songs with NO lyrics or vocal samples (instrumental samples are OK; non-lyrical vocal samples are ACCEPTABLE). Lock the fuck in boys, we’re raw dogging it this week

Name: Beat Battle
Description: You know that warm fuzzy feeling you get when you think about Vishal’s mom in the morning? What production brings you that type of pleasure?

Name: Songs that would have been unintelligible if released 50 years prior
Description: This is a song that if played 50 years before it was released would have been anachronistic — prochronistic, if you will

Name: Bonus Week: Happy Groundhog Day
Description: It’s Groundhog Day all over again. Submit a song that has already been submitted in a previous Music League season

Name: The GC Put Me On
Description: Whether it was from back in the Pembroke days or in a Spotify DM last week, drop the best song that you can specifically remember someone else in S&T introduced you to (not including previous music league submissions). Put who showed you the song in the a comment when voting; NOT WHEN SUBMITTING!!

Name: Let’s get it started in hereeeeee!
Description: You are at a wedding, the dance floor is empty, and you lock eyes with a desperate DJ. You walk up and tell him “Let me take the sticks, SCRUB!” What is the ONE song coming on to get everyone on the floor?!
